english translation text: Dua Al-Iftetah

arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ إنِّي أَفْتَتِحُ الثَّنَاءَ بِحَمْدِكَ
english translation text: O Allah, I begin glorifying You with Your Praise.

arabic text: وَأَنْتَ مُسَدِّدٌ لِلصَّوَابِ بِمَنِّكَ،
english translation text: And You are the one who direct towards salvation through Your Grace.

arabic text: وَأَيْقَنْتُ أَنَّكَ أَنْتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ فِي مَوْضِعِ الْعَفْوِ وَالرَّحْمَةِ،
english translation text: I am certain that You are the most Merciful in matters of forgiveness and mercy,

arabic text: وَأَشَدُّ الْمُعَاقِبِينَ فِي مَوْضِعِ النَّكَالِ وَالنِّقِمَةِ،
english translation text: but most severe in matters of warning and retribution,

arabic text: وَأَعْظَمُ الْمُتَجَبِّرِينَ فِي مَوْضِعِ الْكِبْرِيَاءِ وَالْعَظَمَةِ.
english translation text: and the most mighty in matters of power and magnificence.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ أَذِنْتَ لِي فِي دُعَائِكَ وَمَسْأَلَتِكَ،
english translation text: O Allah, You have allowed me to supplicate to You and ask from You.

arabic text: فَاسْمَعْ يَا سَمِيعُ مِدْحَتِي، وَأَجِبْ يَا رَحِيمُ دَعْوَتِي،
english translation text: Then (please) hear my praise, O One who hears all, and answer my call, O Merciful,

arabic text: وَأَقِلْ يَا غَفُورُ عَثْرَتِي،
english translation text: and decrease my mistakes, O most Forgiving.

arabic text: فَكَمْ يَا إلهِي مِنْ كُرْبَةٍ قَدْ فَرَّجْتَهَا، وَهُمُومٍ قَدْ كَشَفْتَهَا،
english translation text: How often, O my God, You have relieved me of troubles, how much grief You have dispelled,

arabic text: وَعَثْرَةٍ قَدْ أَقَلْتَهَا، وَرَحْمَةٍ قَدْ نَشَرْتَهَا،
english translation text: how many mistakes You have prevented, how many blessings You have spread,

arabic text: وَحَلْقَةِ بَلاءٍ قَدْ فَكَكْتَهَا
english translation text: and how many series of afflictions You have eased.

arabic text: الْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ الَّذِي لَمْ يَتَّخِذْ صَاحِبَةً وَلا وَلَداً
english translation text: All Praise is for Allah who has not taken a wife nor a son,

arabic text: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ شَرِيكٌ فِي الْمُلْكِ
english translation text: who has no partner in His Kingdom,

arabic text: وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ وَلِيٌّ مِنَ الذُّلِّ وَكَبِّرْهُ تَكْبِيراً.
english translation text: who has no friend to protect Him, so magnify Him with a great Magnificence.

arabic text: ٱللَّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ
english translation text: [Allah is Great]

arabic text: الْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ بِجَمِيعِ مَحَامِدِهِ كُلِّهَا،
english translation text: All Praise is for Allah for all His praiseworthy acts,

arabic text: عَلَى جَمِيعِ نِعَمِهِ كُلِّهَا.
english translation text: for all His favours and blessings.

arabic text: الْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ الَّذِي لا مُضَادَّ لَهُ فِي مُلْكِهِ،
english translation text: All Praise is for Allah who has no opposition in His Kingdom,

arabic text: وَلا مُنَازِعَ لَهُ فِي أَمْرِهِ.
english translation text: nor any challenge to His command.

arabic text: الْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ الَّذِي لا شَرِيكَ لَهُ فِي خَلْقِهِ،
english translation text: All Praise is for Allah who has no partner in creation,

arabic text: وَلا شَبِيهَ لَهُ فِي عَظَمَتِهِ.
english translation text: nor anyone like Him in His Greatness.

arabic text: الْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ الْفَاشِي فِي الْخَلْقِ أَمْرُهُ
english translation text: All Praise is for Allah, His commands operate over His creation,

arabic text: وَحَمْدُه الظَّاهِرِ بِالْكَرَمِ مَجْدُهُ،
english translation text: and His glory is evident through His Generosity,

arabic text: الْبَاسِطِ بِالْجُودِ يَدَهُ،
english translation text: whose bestowal stretches out liberally.

arabic text: الَّذِي لا تَنْقُصُ خَزَائِنُهُ،
english translation text: His treasures never decrease,

arabic text: وَلا تَزِيدُهُ كَثْرَةُ الْعَطَاءِ إلاَّ جُوداً وَكَرَماً
english translation text: (rather) the frequency of His Giving increases through His Generosity and Kindness.

arabic text: إنَّهُ هُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الْوَهَّابُ.
english translation text: Surely He is the Mighty, the Bestower.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ إنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ قَلِيلاً مِنْ كَثِيرٍ،
english translation text: O Allah, I ask You for a little from much,

arabic text: مَعَ حَاجَةٍ بِي إلَيْهِ عَظِيمَةٍ
english translation text: although I am in great need of it,

arabic text: وَ غِنَاكَ عَنْهُ قَدِيمٌ
english translation text: while You are eternally needless of it,

arabic text: وَهُوَ عِنْدِي كَثِيرٌ، وَهُوَ عَلَيْكَ سَهْلٌ يَسِيرٌ.
english translation text: though it is a lot for me, while it is easy and simple for You.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ إنَّ عَفْوَكَ عَنْ ذَنْبِي، وَتَجَاوُزَكَ عَنْ خَطِيئَتِي،
english translation text: O Allah, indeed Your forgiveness of my sins and Your overlooking my faults,

arabic text: وَصَفْحَكَ عَنْ ظُلْمِي، وَسِتْرَكَ عَلَى قَبِيحِ عَمَلِي،
english translation text: Your pardoning my oppression, Your hiding my ugly deeds,

arabic text: وَحِلْمَكَ عَنْ كَثِيرِ جُرْمِي
english translation text: and Your forbearing my many wrongs,

arabic text: عِنْدَ مَا كَانَ مِنْ خَطَإي وَعَمْدِي
english translation text: done intentionally or unintentionally,

arabic text: أَطْمَعَنِي فِي أَنْ أَسْأَلَكَ مَا لا أَسْتَوْجِبُهُ مِنْكَ
english translation text: tempted me to ask from You what I do not deserve from You,

arabic text: الَّذِي رَزَقْتَنِي مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ،
english translation text: which You (still) gave me out of Your Mercy,

arabic text: وَأَرَيْتَنِي مِنْ قُدْرَتِكَ، وَعَرَّفْتَنِي مِنْ إجَابَتِكَ،
english translation text: provided me by Your Power, and made known to me from Your answers.

arabic text: فَصِرْتُ أَدْعُوكَ آمِناً، وَأَسْأَلُكَ مُسْتَأْنِساً
english translation text: So I became habituated to call You trustingly and ask You familiarly,

arabic text: لا خَائِفاً وَلا وَجِلاً،
english translation text: neither fearing nor scared,

arabic text: مُدِلاً عَلَيْكَ فِيمَا قَصَدْتُ فِيهِ إلَيْكَ،
english translation text: but with confidence in You for what I intended.

arabic text: فَإنْ أَبْطَأ عَنِّي عَتَبْتُ بِجَهْلِي عَلَيْكَ،
english translation text: Then if there was a delay (in Your answer), I would blame You, due to my ignorance,

arabic text: وَلَعَلَّ الَّذِي أَبْطَأَ عَنِّي هُوَ خَيْرٌ لِي لِعِلْمِكَ بِعَاقِبَةِ الأُمُورِ،
english translation text: and perhaps the delay was best for me, for You know the outcome of all affairs.

arabic text: فَلَمْ أَرَ مَوْلَىً كَرِيماً أَصْبَرَ عَلَى عَبْدٍ لَئِيمٍ مِنْكَ عَلَيَّ،
english translation text: I have not seen a generous Master more patient with a wretched slave, than the way You are with me.

arabic text: يَارَبِّ، إنَّكَ تَدْعُونِي فَأُوَلِّي عَنْكَ،
english translation text: My Lord, You call me and I turn away from You,

arabic text: وَتَتَحَبَّبُ إلَيَّ فأَتَبَغَّضُ إلَيْكَ،
english translation text: You show affection to me and I show hatred towards You,

arabic text: وَتَتَوَدَّدُ إلَيَّ فَلا أَقْبَلُ مِنْكَ كَأَنَّ لِيَ التَّطَوُّلَ عَلَيْكَ،
english translation text: You display Your love for me and I do not respond, as though I am above You.

arabic text: فَلَمْ يَمْنَعْكَ ذلِكَ مِنَ الرَّحْمَةِ لِي وَالإحْسَانِ إلَيَّ،
english translation text: But this does not prevent You from having mercy upon me, or bestowing goodness upon me,

arabic text: وَالتَّفَضُّلِ عَلَيَّ بِجُودِكَ وَكَرَمِكَ،
english translation text: and favouring me, through Your Generosity and Nobility.

arabic text: فَارْحَمْ عَبْدَكَ الْجَاهِلَ وَجُدْ عَلَيْهِ بِفَضْلِ إحْسَانِكَ
english translation text: So please (continue to) have mercy on Your ignorant slave, and be kind to him through the excellence of Your Grace.

arabic text: إنَّكَ جَوَادٌ كَرِيمٌ.
english translation text: Surely You are the Bountiful, the Generous.

arabic text: الْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ مَالِكِ الْمُلْكِ، مُجْرِي الْفُلْكِ،
english translation text: All Praise is for Allah, the Owner of the Kingdom, who makes the ships sail,

arabic text: مُسَخِّرِ الرِّيَاحِ، فَالِقِ الإصْبَاحِ،
english translation text:
controls the wind,
causes the dawn to break,

arabic text: دَيَّانِ الدِّينِ، رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ.
english translation text: is the authority on the Day of Judgement, (and) is the Lord of the worlds.

arabic text: الْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ عَلَى حِلْمِهِ بَعْدَ عِلْمِهِ،
english translation text: All Praise is for Allah for His patience despite His knowledge.

arabic text: وَالْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ عَلَى عَفْوِهِ بَعْدَ قُدْرَتِهِ،
english translation text: All Praise is for Allah for His forgiveness despite His power.

arabic text: وَالْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ عَلَى طُولِ أَنَاتِهِ فِي غَضَبِهِ
english translation text: All Praise is for Allah for the lengthy respite He gives despite His anger,

arabic text: وَهُوَ قَادِرٌ عَلَى مَا يُرِيدُ.
english translation text: though He has the power to do as He wills.

arabic text: الْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ خَالِقِ الْخَلْقِ،
english translation text: All Praise is for Allah the Creator of all creation,

arabic text: بَاسِطِ الرِّزْقِ،
english translation text: the provider of plentiful sustenance, the cleaver of the dawn,

arabic text: فَالِقِ الإصْبَاحِ،
english translation text: Who starts the day,

arabic text: ذِي الْجَلالِ وَالإكْرَامِ وَالْفَضْلِ وَالإنْعَامِ
english translation text: possessor of Glory and Honor, and Excellence and Blessings,

arabic text: الَّذِي بَعُدَ فَلا يُرَى، وَقَرُبَ فَشَهِدَ النَّجْوَى،
english translation text: who is far and thus cannot be seen, but is close and thus witnesses secret conversations.

arabic text: تَبَارَكَ وَتَعَالَى
english translation text: Blessed and Exalted be His name.

arabic text: الْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ الَّذِي لَيْسَ لَهُ مُنَازِعٌ يُعَادِلُهُ،
english translation text: All Praise is for Allah who has no equal to challenge Him,

arabic text: وَلا شَبِيهٌ يُشَاكِلُهُ، وَلا ظَهِيرٌ يُعَاضِدُهُ
english translation text: nor anyone similar to Him, nor any Helper to support Him.

arabic text: قَهَرَ بِعِزَّتِهِ الأَعِزَّاءَ، وَتَوَاضَعَ لِعَظَمَتِهِ الْعُظَمَاءُ،
english translation text: He overpowers the mighty by His strength, even the powerful (ones) humble themselves before His greatness.

arabic text: فَبَلَغَ بِقُدْرَتِهِ مَا يَشَاءُ.
english translation text: He accomplishes what He wishes through His power.

arabic text: الْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ الَّذِي يُجِيبُنِي حِينَ أُنَادِيهِ،
english translation text: All Praise is for Allah, who answers me when I call unto Him,

arabic text: وَيَسْتُرُ عَلَيَّ كُلَّ عَوْرَةٍ وَأَنَا أَعْصِيهِ،
english translation text: conceals all my faults even though I disobey Him,

arabic text: وَيُعَظِّمُ النِّعْمَةَ عَلَيَّ فَلا أُجَازِيهِ،
english translation text: increases His bounties on me even though I do not acknowledge them.

arabic text: فَكَمْ مِنْ مَوْهِبَةٍ هَنِيئَةٍ قَدْ أَعْطَانِي،
english translation text: How many pleasant bounties has He given me,

arabic text: وَعَظِيمَةٍ مَخُوفَةٍ قَدْ كَفَانِي، وَبَهْجَةٍ مُونِقَةٍ قَدْ أَرَانِي
english translation text: how many great fears He has removed, and how many delightful joys He has shown me.

arabic text: فَأُثْنِي عَلَيْهِ حَامِداً، وَأَذْكُرُهُ مُسَبِّحاً.
english translation text: Thus I glorify Him, thanking Him and I remember Him with praise.

arabic text: الْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ الَّذِي لا يُهْتَكُ حِجَابُهُ، وَلايُغْلَقُ  بَابُهُ،
english translation text: All praise is for Allah, what is hidden by Him cannot be revealed, whose doors cannot be shut,

arabic text: وَلا يُرَدُّ سَائِلُهُ، وَلا يُخَيَّبُ آمِلُهُ.
english translation text: who does not reject the one who asks Him, and who does not disappoint the one who places hope in Him.

arabic text: الْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ الَّذِي يُؤْمِنُ الْخَائِفِينَ،
english translation text: All Praise is for Allah, who provides safety for the frightened,

arabic text: وَيُنَجِّي الصَّالِحِينَ، وَيَرْفَعُ الْمُسْتَضْعَفِينَ،
english translation text: rescues the virtuous, rescues the oppressed,

arabic text: وَيَضَعُ الْمُسْتَكْبِرِينَ، وَيُهْلِكُ مُلُوكاً
english translation text: humiliates the proud, destroys kings,

arabic text: وَيَسْتَخْلِفُ آخَرِينَ
english translation text: and replaces them with others.

arabic text: وَالْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ قَاصِمِ الْجَبَّارِينَ،
english translation text: All Praise is for Allah, who crushes the tyrants,

arabic text: مُبِيرِ الظَّالِمِينَ، مُدْرِكِ الْهَارِبِينَ،
english translation text: annihilates the oppressors, watches over the ones who flee,

arabic text: نَكَالِ الظَّالِمِينَ، صَرِيخِ الْمُسْتَصْرِخِينَ،
english translation text:
punishes the oppressors,
assists those who cry for help,

arabic text: مَوْضِعِ حَاجَاتِ الطَّالِبِينَ، مُعْتَمَدِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ.
english translation text: grants the requests of the beseechers, and is the confidence of the believers.

arabic text: الْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ الَّذِي مِنْ خَشْيَتِهِ تَرْعُدُ السَّمَاءُ وَسُكَّانُهَا،
english translation text: All praise is for Allah in whose awe the skies and its inhabitants tremble,

arabic text: وَتَرْجُفُ الأَرْضُ وَعُمَّارُهَا،
english translation text: the earth and its inhabitants tremble,

arabic text: وَتَمُوجُ الْبِحَارُ وَمَنْ يَسْبَحُ فِي غَمَرَاتِهَا،
english translation text: the sea and all that swims in it billow.

arabic text: الْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ الَّذِي هَدَانَا لِهذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لِنَهْتَدِيَ لَوْلا أَنْ هَدَانَا اللّهُ.
english translation text: All praise is for Allah who guided us to this

arabic text: الْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ الَّذِي يَخْلُقُ وَلَمْ يُخْلَقْ،
english translation text: All Praise is for Allah who creates but is not created,

arabic text: وَيَرْزُقُ وَلا يُرْزَقُ، وَيُطْعِمُ وَلا يُطْعَمُ،
english translation text: gives sustenance but is not given sustenance, feeds but is not fed

arabic text: وَيُمِيتُ الأَحْيَاءَ، وَيُحْيِي الْمَوْتَى،
english translation text: causes the living to die, and gives life to the dead.

arabic text: وَهُوَ حَيٌّ لا يَمُوتُ، بِيَدِهِ الْخَيْرُ،
english translation text: He is Ever-Living and does not die, (and) in His control is all good,

arabic text: وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ.
english translation text: and He has power over all things.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَرَسُولِكَ
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad, Your servant, Your Messenger,

arabic text: وَأَمِينِكَ وَصَفِيِّكَ وَحَبِيبِكَ
english translation text: Your trustee, Your chosen One, Your beloved,

arabic text: وَخِيَرَتِكَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ، وَحَافِظِ سِرِّكَ، وَمُبَلِّغِ رِسَالاتِكَ
english translation text: the best of Your creation, the preserver of Your secrets, and the preacher of Your messages,

arabic text: أَفْضَلَ وَأَحْسَنَ وَأَجْمَلَ وَأَكْمَلَ وَأَزْكَى
english translation text: the most superior, elegant, handsome, perfect, upright,

arabic text: وَأَنْمَى وَأَطْيَبَ وَأَطْهَرَ وَأَسْنَى
english translation text: prosperous, pleasant, holy and sublime,

arabic text: وَأَكْثَرَ مَا صَلَّيْتَ وَبَارَكْتَ وَتَرَحَّمْتَ
english translation text: more than what You have blessed, given, had mercy,

arabic text: وَتَحَنَّنْتَ وَسَلَّمْتَ عَلَى أَحَدٍ مِنْ عِبَادِكَ وَأَنْبِيَائِكَ
english translation text: supported and greeted, anyone from Your servants, Your Prophets,

arabic text: وَرُسُلِكَ وَصِفْوَتِكَ وَأَهْلِ الْكَرَامَةِ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ.
english translation text: Your Messengers, Your chosen ones and the honorable ones from Your creation.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ وَصَلِّ عَلَى عَلِيٍّ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ،
english translation text: O Allah, and send Your blessings on Ali, the commander of the faithful,

arabic text: وَوَصِيِّ رَسُولِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ،
english translation text: and the successor of the Messenger of the Lord of the worlds.

arabic text: عَبْدِكَ وَوَلِيِّكَ وَأَخِي رَسُولِكَ وَحُجَّتِكَ عَلَى خَلْقِكَ،
english translation text: Your servant, Your authority, the brother of Your Messenger, Your proof over creation,

arabic text: وَآيَتِكَ الْكُبْرَى، وَالنَّبَأَ الْعَظِيمِ،
english translation text: Your great sign, and the mighty awaited news.

arabic text: وَصَلِّ عَلَى الصِّدِّيقَةِ الطَّاهِرَةِ
english translation text: And send blessings on the truthful, pure (lady)

arabic text: فَاطِمَةَ الزَّهرَآءِ سَيِّدَةِ نِسَاءِ الْعَالَمِينَ،
english translation text: Fatima al ­Zahra, the leader of the women of the worlds.

arabic text: وَصَلِّ عَلَى سِبْطَيِ الرَّحْمَةِ، وَإمَامَيِ الْهُدَى
english translation text: And send Your blessings on the two grandsons of mercy (unto the world), the leaders of guidance,

arabic text: الْحَسَنِ وَالْحُسَيْنِ سَيِّدَيْ شَبَابِ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ،
english translation text: al-Hasan and al-Husayn, the leaders of the youths of Paradise.

arabic text: وَصَلِّ عَلَى أَئِمَّةِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ،
english translation text: And send blessings on the leaders of Muslims, Ali son of Husayn,

arabic text: وَمُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ،
english translation text: Muhammad son of Ali,

arabic text: وَجَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
english translation text: Jafar son of Muhammad,

arabic text: وَمُوسَى بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ،
english translation text: Musa son of Jafar,

arabic text: وَعَلِيِّ بْنِ مُوسَى،
english translation text: Ali son of Musa,

arabic text: وَمُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ،
english translation text: Muhammad son of Ali,

arabic text: وَعَلِيِّ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
english translation text: Ali son of Muhammad,

arabic text: وَالْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ،
english translation text: Hasan son of Ali,

arabic text: وَالْخَلَفِ الْهَادِي الْمَهْدِيِّ،
english translation text: and the successor, the guide, and the (divinely) guided.

arabic text: حُجَجِكَ عَلَى عِبَادِكَ، وَأُمَنَائِكَ فِي بِلادِكَ
english translation text: (These are) Your proofs over Your servants, Your trustees on Your land.

arabic text: صَلاةً كَثِيرَةً دَائِمَةً.
english translation text: Bless (them with) numerous and continuous blessings.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ وَصَلِّ عَلَى وَليِّ أَمْرِكَ الْقَائِمِ الْمُؤَمَّلِ،
english translation text: O Allah, send blessings on the guardian of Your orders, the one who will rise,

arabic text: وَالْعَدْلِ الْمُنْتَظَرِ، وَحُفَّهُ بِمَلائِكَتِكَ الْمُقَرَّبِينَ،
english translation text: the one hoped for, the awaited justice. Surround him with Your favourite angels

arabic text: وَأَيِّدْهُ بِرُوحِ الْقُدُسِ ، يَارَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ.
english translation text: and assist him with the holy spirit, O Lord of the worlds.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ اجْعَلْهُ الدَّاعِيَ إلَى كِتَابِكَ، وَالْقَائِمَ بِدِينِكَ،
english translation text: O Allah, appoint him to invite towards Your book to establish Your religion.

arabic text: اسْتَخْلِفْهُ فِي الأَرْضِ كَمَا اسْتَخْلَفْتَ الَّذِينَ مِنْ قَبْلِهِ،
english translation text: Make him the successor on the earth as You caused others to succeed before him.

arabic text: مَكِّنْ لَهُ دِينَهُ الَّذِي ارْتَضَيْتَهُ لَهُ،
english translation text: Establish for him his religion which You have approved for him.

arabic text: أَبْدِلْهُ مِنْ بَعْدِ خَوْفِهِ أَمْناً، يَعْبُدُكَ لا يُشْرِكُ بِكَ شَيْئاً.
english translation text: Give him security after fear such that You are worshipped by all and none shall attribute partners to You.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ أَعِزَّهُ وَأَعْزِزْ بِهِ، وَانْصُرْهُ وَانْتَصِرْ بِهِ،
english translation text: O Allah, give him power and through him strengthen (others), help him and help (others) through him.

arabic text: وَانْصُرْهُ نَصْراً عَزِيزاً، وَافْتَحْ لَهُ فَتْحاً يَسِيراً،
english translation text: Help him with a mighty help, and give him an easy victory,

arabic text: وَاجْعَلْ لَهُ مِنْ لَدُنْكَ سُلْطَاناً نَصِيراً.
english translation text: and grant him with an authoritative leadership.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ أَظْهِرْ بِهِ دِينَكَ وَسُنَّةَ نَبِيِّكَ
english translation text: O Allah, make manifest through him Your religion and the way of Your Prophet,

arabic text: حَتَّى لا يَسْتَخْفِيَ بِشَيْءٍ مِنَ الْحَقِّ مَخَافَةَ أَحَدٍ مِنَ الْخَلْقِ.
english translation text: until nothing from the truth remains hidden from any human being.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ إنَّا نَرْغَبُ إلَيْكَ فِي دَوْلَةٍ كَرِيمَةٍ
english translation text: O Allah, we seek from You (the establishment) of the honorable state,

arabic text: تُعِزُّ بِهَا الإسْلامَ وَأَهْلَهُ، وَتُذِلُّ بِهَا النِّفَاقَ وَأَهْلَهُ،
english translation text: through which You strengthen Islam and its people and degrade hypocrisy and its followers.

arabic text: وَتَجْعَلُنَا فِيهَا مِنَ الدُّعَاةِ إلَى طَاعَتِكَ،
english translation text: And make us in it amongst the inviters towards Your obedience,

arabic text: وَالْقَادَةِ إلَى سَبِيلِكَ،
english translation text: and the leaders to Your path.

arabic text: وَتَرْزُقُنَا بِهَا كَرَامَةَ الدُّنْيَا وَالآخِرَةِ.
english translation text: Give us through it honor of the world and the Hereafter.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ مَا عَرَّفْتَنَا مِنَ الْحَقِّ فَحَمِّلْنَاهُ،
english translation text: O Allah, what You have made known to us of the truth, help us implement it,

arabic text: وَمَا قَصُرْنَا عَنْهُ فَبَلِّغْنَاهُ.
english translation text: and where we fall short, You make us accomplish it.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ الْمُمْ بِه شَعَثَنَا، وَاشْعَبْ بِهِ صَدْعَنَا،
english translation text: O Allah, through Him (Imam Al Mahdi) put our affairs in order, and unite our flocks,

arabic text: وَارْتُقْ بِهِ فَتْقَنَا، وَكَثِّرْ بِهِ قِلَّتَنَا،
english translation text: And through Him bind our separations and increase our minority,

arabic text: وَأَعْزِزْ بِهِ ذِلَّتَنَا، وَأَغْنِ بِهِ عَائِلَنَا،
english translation text: Through him elevate us from degradation and relieve us from (our) miseries,

arabic text: وَاقْضِ بِهِ عَنْ مُغْرَمِنَا، وَاجْبُرْ بِهِ فَقْرَنَا،
english translation text: Through Him relieve us of our debts and eradicate our poverty,

arabic text: وَسُدَّ بِهِ خَلَّتَنَا، وَيَسِّرْ بِهِ عُسْرَنَا،
english translation text: Through Him strengthen our morality, and ease our difficulties,

arabic text: وَبَيِّضْ بِهِ وُجُوهَنَا، وَفُكَّ بِهِ أَسْرَنَا،
english translation text: Through Him brighten our faces and free our prisoners,

arabic text: وَأَنْجِحْ بِهِ طَلِبَتَنَا، وَأَنْجِزْ بِهِ مَوَاعِيدَنَا،
english translation text: Through Him grant our requests and fulfill our promises,

arabic text: وَاسْتَجِبْ بِهِ دَعْوَتَنَا، وَأَعْطِنَا بِهِ سُؤْلَنَا،
english translation text: Through Him answer our calls and grant us our requests,

arabic text: وَبَلِّغْنَا بِهِ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا وَالآخِرَةِ آمَالَنَا،
english translation text: Through Him enable us to obtain what we hope for, from this world and the hereafter,

arabic text: وَأَعْطِنَا بِهِ فَوْقَ رَغْبَتِنَا،
english translation text: and through Him give us more than what we expect.

arabic text: يَا خَيْرَ الْمَسْؤُولِينَ، وَأَوْسَعَ الْمُعْطِينَ،
english translation text: O the best of all who can be asked and the most generous of bestowers,

arabic text: اشْفِ بِهِ صُدُورَنَا، وَأَذْهِبْ بِهِ غَيْظَ قُلُوبِنَا،
english translation text: through him, cleanse our chests, remove the stains of anger and hatred from our hearts,

arabic text: وَاهْدِنَا بِهِ لِمَا اخْتُلِفَ فِيهِ مِنَ الْحَقِّ بِإذْنِكَ،
english translation text: and guide us to the truth on disputed matters, by Your permission.

arabic text: إنَّكَ تَهْدِي مَنْ تَشَاءُ إلَى صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ،
english translation text: Surely You guide whom You wish to the right path.

arabic text: وَانْصُرْنَا بِهِ عَلَى عَدُوِّكَ وَعَدُوِّنَا
english translation text: Through him help us to overcome Your enemy and our enemy.

arabic text: إلهَ الْحَقِّ آمِينَ.
english translation text: O God of truth, Amen.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ إنَّا نَشْكُو إلَيْكَ، فَقْدَ نَبِيِّنَا صَلَوَاتُكَ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ،
english translation text: O Allah, we complain to You of the absence of our Prophet, Your blessings be on him and his family,

arabic text: وَغَيْبَةَ وَلِيِّنَا، وَكَثْرَةَ عَدُوِّنَا،
english translation text: the concealment of our leader, the abundance of our enemies,

arabic text: وَقِلَّةَ عَدَدِنَا، وَشِدَّةَ الْفِتَنِ بِنَا،
english translation text: the scarcity of our numbers, the severity of our trials,

arabic text: وَتَظَاهُرَ الزَّمَانِ عَلَيْنَا،
english translation text: and the victory of the era against us.

arabic text: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ،
english translation text: So bless Muhammad and his family

arabic text: وَأَعِنَّا عَلَى ذلِكَ بِفَتْحٍ مِنْكَ تُعَجِّلُهُ،
english translation text: and help us overcome that by granting us an immediate victory,

arabic text: وَبِضُرٍّ تَكْشِفُهُ، وَنَصْرٍ تُعِزُّهُ، وَسُلْطَانِ حَقٍّ تُظْهِرُهُ،
english translation text: dispersing miseries, giving us a help that strengthens, providing an authority of truth which You manifest,

arabic text: وَرَحْمَةٍ مِنْكَ تُجَلِّلُنَاهَا، وَعَافِيَةٍ مِنْكَ تُلْبِسُنَاهَا،
english translation text: a mercy from You which is clear to us, and a well­being from You which encompasses us

arabic text: بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.
english translation text:
by Your mercy,
O most Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
